articles: I — Grant of Franchise, Term and Area of Protection (Sections 1.1-1.5)
II — Development and Opening of the Hotel (Sections 2.1-2.8)

grant_and_term.term: 20 years from first day of month Hotel opens
grant_and_term.successor_term: 10 years on then-current terms (may be materially different)

fee_and_payment_obligations.royalty: 7% of GRR from Channel Bookings, due 10th of each month

site_selection_and_construction.opening_deadline: 24 months (new) or 6 months (conversion) after FA signing

training_and_operational_obligations.gm_vacancy_standards: Interim GM must complete GMU if no permanent GM within 6 months

termination_triggers_and_cure_periods.30_day_cure: Development deadlines, provider payments, related agreements, other defaults
non_curable: Contesting IP ownership or attempting to register
termination_triggers_and_cure_periods.suspension_remedies: May suspend CRS/GDS/ADS, remove from advertising/website, suspend fee reductions, refuse support

transfer_restrictions.non_controlling_transfers_exempt: If not Competing Brand Owner, not sanctioned, no CI creation, notice within 30 days

noncompete_scope.during_term: Not a formal noncompete, but cannot be Competing Brand Owner (entity that franchises/owns brand with 5+ competing hotels, manages exclusively for such brand, or affiliate thereof)
noncompete_scope.management_company_restriction: Same — cannot be Competing Brand Owner

guaranty_scope.who_must_sign: One or more owners of Controlling Ownership Interest that franchisor specifies
guaranty_scope.scope: All obligations — monetary and non-monetary, including confidentiality and arbitration
guaranty_scope.spousal_guaranty: Not explicitly stated but Controlling Ownership Interest definition is broad
guaranty_scope.unlimited: Yes — guaranty covers all FA obligations without limitation
guaranty_scope.guarantor_monetary_threshold: Minimum net worth + minimum liquidity, increasing annually by CPI

liquidated_damages.formula: Lesser of 60 or remaining months × (Average Monthly Revenue × 3.5% + Average Monthly Revenue from Channel Bookings × 7%)
liquidated_damages.casualty_termination: Lesser of formula damages or Net Recovery
liquidated_damages.condemnation_exception: Termination Agreement may waive damages, but if new hotel built within AOP within 24 months, must pay $6,500/room

venue_and_dispute_resolution.location: Within 10 miles of franchisor's principal business address (currently Chicago, IL)
venue_and_dispute_resolution.governing_law: Illinois (subject to FAA, federal law, state overrides)
venue_and_dispute_resolution.burden_level: moderate to high (franchisee must litigate away from home)

indemnification.franchisee_indemnifies_franchisor_for: All claims from application, Hotel development/operation, failure to open on time, breach, and proportionate share of defending actions involving Hotel and other Hyatt Network Hotels
indemnification.no_mitigation_required: Indemnified party need not seek recovery from insurer or third party

force_majeure.excuses_performance: Yes — delays extend or excuse performance
force_majeure.does_not_excuse_payments: Payments of amounts due under FA not excused by Force Majeure

distinctive_clauses.clause: Right of First Offer (Exhibit C to FA)
distinctive_clauses.description: Franchisor has right of first offer on Hotel transfers or Controlling Ownership Interest transfers, but only in strategic markets franchisor designates and only if Exhibit C is signed
5% of total operating revenue monthly into separate capital reserve account; funds used only for approved capital expenditures and upgrades

distinctive_clauses.clause: Guarantor Monetary Threshold with CPI Escalation
distinctive_clauses.description: Minimum net worth and liquidity requirements that automatically increase annually by CPI, with annual financial statement verification
Franchisee owns the Hotel's tradename but must not use it for any other hotel/resort/lodging facility other than the Hotel or another Brand Hotel during FA term
7% royalty applies only to Channel Bookings (direct + branded channels), not to OTA bookings. Unique structure that incentivizes direct bookings.
Liquidated damages increase to 150% if termination involves transfer to Competitor or 3+ cross-defaults with Hyatt affiliates
